message:
Fix Compose Post and Reply to match Moltbook API

- createPost: use 'content' not 'body', 'submolt' (name) not 'submoltId'
- createComment: use 'content' not 'body', snake_case parent_id
- votePost/voteComment: use /upvote and /downvote endpoints
- Connect real ComposePostView in FeedView (remove placeholder)
